commit_scope: Remove the redundant local docker-exec listener curl for the production-manifest kernel-router deploy canary. Docker health and the public mutation probes prove that sibling; the BML sibling keeps its local kernel_status listener proof.

local_validation.notes: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27975448408 deployed ae34c1da but failed on the local kernel-router /api/health listener curl. Manual public kernel canary passed after the same deployment settled, proving the production-manifest route through public Traefik.

ci_validation.notes: CI will run after the branch is pushed and the PR opens.

deploy_validation.notes: After deploy, Hostinger Auto Deploy should reach Verify kernel public canary and pass.

phase_gate.reason: Local validation passed; PR checks, deploy, and public kernel canary proof remain pending.

evidence_refs: Hostinger Auto Deploy run 27975448408 failed in roll-forward at ensure_kernel_router_canary: kernel-router listener did not accept local HTTP at /api/health within 90 seconds.
The same run deployed ae34c1dac491c8ab0b8270173cef70166a591f43 and public health reported that SHA.

Manual bash scripts/verify_kernel_canary_public_gate.sh https://api.coherencycoin.com passed after deployment settled, including public-gate, no-header default, BML runtime attention, and explicit fallback.
The BML front-door sibling keeps a local /api/utils/kernel_status listener probe before public verification.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Hostinger roll-forward should no longer fail on a redundant local listener curl for the production-manifest kernel-router; Docker health plus public mutation probes remain the proof for that sibling.
test_flows: deploy script shell syntax validates locally.
public kernel canary passes after deploy.
